mission.title: cilium: CFP: Introduce HA mode for DNS proxy
mission.description: CFP: Introduce HA mode for DNS proxy. Requested by 18+ users.

steps.title: Check current cilium deployment
steps.description:
Verify your cilium version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium
helm list -n cilium 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working cilium installation.

steps.title: Review cilium configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant cilium configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium
kubectl get configmap -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cilium
```
## Cilium Feature Proposal

**Is your proposed feature related to a problem?**

Cilium agent uses a DNS proxy to intercept all DNS queries and obtain necessary information for enforcing toFQDN network policies.

steps.title: Apply the fix for CFP: Introduce HA mode for DNS proxy
steps.description:
#### Overview
The CFP talks about the high level overview of Standalone DNS Proxy. CFP: https://github.com/cilium/design-cfps/pull/54. The implementation of the above CFP is divided into separate PRs and this is a guide to help the reviewers. 

#### For the review of the implementation PRs:(recommended order for PR review)
1. Grpc protocol #36121 : This PR talks adds the proto bufs discussed in the CFP. 

2. Cilium agent grpc server #36213 : The PR adds the server side implementation of grpc

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium
kubectl get events -n cilium --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "CFP: Introduce HA mode for DNS proxy" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
#### Overview
The CFP talks about the high level overview of Standalone DNS Proxy. CFP: https://github.com/cilium/design-cfps/pull/54. The implementation of the above CFP is divided into separate PRs and this is a guide to help the reviewers. 

#### For the review of the implementation PRs:(recommended order for PR review)

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with cilium installed or the issue environment reproducible.
